purpose: Require every Story-to-TDD conveyor stage to emit a canonical handoff packet before the next stage may consume its output.
law: Every conveyor stage hands off an artifact, an authority status, actor attribution, hashes, blocker posture, claims, and receipts. Cognitive stages must prove provider participation. Deterministic stages must prove resolver, test, or gate execution.
requires: stage output has a conveyor-stage-handoff-packet.v1 object
packet declares producedBy and consumedBy actors
packet declares authorityStatus before downstream consumption
packet references every artifact being handed off
packet references required receipts and expected receipt statuses
packet declares providerParticipationRequired for cognitive stages
packet declares deterministicVerificationRequired for deterministic stages
packet declares blockedIfMissing codes for absent obligations
packet guardrails preserve mock, stale response, deterministic replay, generated code, SOG, host-language, and host fallback posture
downstream stages consume only packets whose required receipts are present with accepted statuses
forbids: unpacketed stage output entering the next stage
cognitive output without provider dispatch, response, and invocation receipts
deterministic verification output without resolver, gate, or test receipt
green proof without prior red packet
durable product truth without SOG promotion packet
generated code becoming product truth through a packet
silent fallback to stale, mock, or deterministic creation
completionPosture: Stage movement is authoritative only when the packet and its required receipts prove what was produced, who produced it, what may consume it, and why the authority status is valid.
